sequence.template: Hey [Name], just checking in - did you get a chance to look at those [proof]? Happy to answer any questions.
Hey [Name], I'm booking [offer_name] for next week. If you're still interested, I can reserve a slot. Just need to know by [deadline].
Hey [Name], last check - are you moving forward with [their_goal]? If so, I can still fit you in this week.
Hey [Name], I know timing matters. If you're [context] in the next 30 days, I can still help. What's your [timeline_field]?
Hey [Name], hope [their_goal] went well! If you need help with the next one, I'm here.
